requirement: [Memory Transfer (Host ↔ Device)] Validate source and destination pointers for transfer operations

test_cases.description: Validate the source pointer for memory transfer operation from host to device
steps: Set up source pointer for transfer
Perform memory transfer operation from host to device
Verify the integrity of the transferred data at the destination
test_cases.expected_result: Source pointer validation successful for host to device transfer

test_cases.description: Validate the destination pointer for memory transfer operation from device to host
steps: Set up destination pointer for transfer
Perform memory transfer operation from device to host
Verify the integrity of the transferred data at the destination
test_cases.expected_result: Destination pointer validation successful for device to host transfer

test_cases.description: Validate behavior when null pointers are used for memory transfer
steps: Perform memory transfer operation from host to device
Verify the expected behavior or error message
test_cases.expected_result: Proper handling of null pointer for memory transfer operation

test_cases.description: Validate performance of memory transfer for large data sets
steps: Prepare a large data set for transfer
Perform memory transfer operation from host to device
Measure the transfer speed and efficiency
test_cases.expected_result: Memory transfer performance meets specified requirements for large data sets

test_cases.description: Validate source and destination pointers for memory transfer in an integrated system
preconditions: Integrated system with memory transfer capabilities
steps: Set up source and destination pointers for transfer
Verify the integrity of the transferred data at the destination
test_cases.expected_result: Successful validation of source and destination pointers in an integrated system
